description:
A transformation component that takes multiple inputs and merges them 
into a single question with a configurable prompt. This component is 
designed to work with chat, retrieval, or document systems, taking 
questions, documents, text, and tables as input and combining them 
with contextual prompts to improve LLM responses.

input.description: Documents input - collected for merging with prompt
Text input - collected for merging with prompt
Table input - collected for merging with prompt
Questions input - triggers merging of all collected inputs with prompt

output.description: Enhanced questions with prompt (merged from all input types: questions, documents, text, table)

instructions.description: Multiple instructions to add to questions before sending to LLM
instructions.title: Instructions

title: Prompt
